holdings.infoBox: JSML is an equity ETF with a total of 122 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 3.70%, Sterling Infrastructure at 2.93%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 2.87%, Ryman Hospitality Properties at 1.97%, and Commvault Systems at 1.89%.

overview.description: The Janus Henderson Small Cap Growth Alpha ETF (JSML) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Janus Small Cap Growth Alpha index. The fund actively invests in small-cap growth companies, selected based on fundamental factors. JSML was launched on Feb 25, 2016 and is issued by Janus Henderson.
infoTable: Janus Small Cap Growth Alpha Index
